column1: (1) 60-day average, for which each daily Regulatory SVaR is based on a 10-day time horizon.
(2) Regulatory SVaR times a capital multiplier of 3.
(3) Regulatory SVaR-based Capital times 12.5, plus $5,020mm add-on for Risk not Captured in the Model (equivalent of $402 Capital).
Immaterial differences in calculations above may exist due to rounding.
